Using a Seasonal Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (SARIMA) framework, this project captures long-term trends and recurring monthly seasonal patterns to forecast future airline passenger volume with a high degree of precision.

items.description: Developed an early-warning framework to predict high-volatility Bitcoin days using technical, sentiment, and macrofinancial data from 2018–2024. items.description: This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

items.description: REFLEX: a machine learning framework for reflexive markets, where the data distribution depends on the model. We solve for a fixed-point equilibrium between a dealer market-making policy and the OTC bond market it shapes.

The repository includes the notebook, report, results, and README.
